title: astragalus involutivus
intro: Astragalus involutivus, also known as Changi milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus involutivus include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health. Astragalus involutivus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to support overall well-being and prevent illness.
